title: scirpus subtilis
intro: Scirpus subtilis, also known as the Chinese milkwort or small clubrush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Scirpus subtilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried roots, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
